revision.text: [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt={{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|{{{alias}}}}}|link=]] {{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }}{{#if:{{{alias|}}}|[[{{#invoke:Fba|fbalist|{{{alias}}}{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|_old}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|full||{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{#if:{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}}}|y|n}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|y|f}}|{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}{{#switch:{{{shortname alias}}}|Burma|Siam|Western Samoa=_old}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|n|y}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|y|f}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Fba/core]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Fba/core]]: Mass importing wikipedia
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Fba/core]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Fba/core]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki> [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

[[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt={{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|{{{alias}}}}}|link=]] {{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }}{{#if:{{{alias|}}}|[[{{#invoke:Fba|fbalist|{{{alias}}}{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|_old}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|full||{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{#if:{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}}}|y|n}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|y|f}}|{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}{{#switch:{{{shortname alias}}}|Burma|Siam|Western Samoa=_old}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|n|y}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|y|f}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt={{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|{{{alias}}}}}|link=]] {{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }}{{#if:{{{alias|}}}|[[{{#invoke:Fba|fbalist|{{{alias}}}{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|_old}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|full||{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{#if:{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}}}|y|n}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|y|f}}|{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}{{#switch:{{{shortname alias}}}|Burma|Siam|Western Samoa=_old}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|n|y}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|y|f}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]}}{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt={{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|{{{alias}}}}}|link=]] {{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }}{{#if:{{{alias|}}}|[[{{#invoke:Fba|fbalist|{{{alias}}}{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|_old}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|full||{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{#if:{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}}}|y|n}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|y|f}}|{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}{{#switch:{{{shortname alias}}}|Burma|Siam|Western Samoa=_old}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|n|y}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|y|f}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt={{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|{{{alias}}}}}|link=]] {{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }}{{#if:{{{alias|}}}|[[{{#invoke:Fba|fbalist|{{{alias}}}{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|_old}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|full||{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{#if:{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}}}|y|n}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|y|f}}|{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}{{#switch:{{{shortname alias}}}|Burma|Siam|Western Samoa=_old}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|n|y}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|y|f}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]}}{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt={{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|{{{alias}}}}}|link=]] {{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }}{{#if:{{{alias|}}}|[[{{#invoke:Fba|fbalist|{{{alias}}}{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|_old}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|full||{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{#if:{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}}}|y|n}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|y|f}}|{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}{{#switch:{{{shortname alias}}}|Burma|Siam|Western Samoa=_old}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|n|y}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|y|f}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]}}{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

[[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt={{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|{{{alias}}}}}|link=]] {{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }}{{#if:{{{alias|}}}|[[{{#invoke:Fba|fbalist|{{{alias}}}{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|_old}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|full||{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{#if:{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}}}|y|n}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|y|f}}|{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}{{#switch:{{{shortname alias}}}|Burma|Siam|Western Samoa=_old}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|n|y}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|y|f}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]}}{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fba%2Fcore here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[File:{{{flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{flag alias}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{size|}}}|{{{size}}}|{{{size flag alias-{{{variant}}}|{{#if:{{{variant|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{#if:{{{flag alias-{{{altvar}}}|}}}|23x15px|{{{size flag alias|23x15px}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{border-{{{variant}}}|{{{border-{{{altvar}}}|{{{border|border}}}}}}}}} |alt={{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|{{{alias}}}}}|link=]] {{#switch:{{{flag alias}}}|Flag of Switzerland.svg|Flag of the Vatican City.svg= }}{{#ifeq:{{{alias}}}|Nepal|  }}{{#if:{{{alias|}}}|[[{{#invoke:Fba|fbalist|{{{alias}}}{{#if:{{{altlink|}}}|_old}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{name}}}|full||{{!}}{{#ifeq:{{#if:{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}}}|y|n}}|{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|y|f}}|{{#invoke:Fba|clist|{{{alias}}}{{#switch:{{{shortname alias}}}|Burma|Siam|Western Samoa=_old}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|code|n|y}}|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|y|f}}|{{{name}}}|{{{name alias-{{{altvar}}}|{{{shortname alias|{{{alias}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}]]}}{{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
